# Mach.PortRightError

**Enumeration**

Possible errors that can be thrown by Mach.Port operations.

## Declaration

```swift
enum PortRightError
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **Mach.PortRightError.deadName**: Returned when an operation cannot be completed, because the Mach port right has become a dead name. This is caused by deallocation of the receive right on the other end.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Error
- Escapable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
